text:
  - id: ofj6
    sections: ["7"]
---
When writing out the type of a multi-dimensional array
or allocating a multi-dimensional array,
the element type is written once for each dimension
(e.g., `int[] int[] a = new int[2] int[3]` for a two-by-three array of ints).

frontmatter.shortDescription: The type of a multi-dimensional array is written as T[] T[] T[]
frontmatter.shortCorrection: The type of a multi-dimensional array is written as T[][][]
